name: 3 Shelf Wide Metal Storage Cart White - Brightroom™
description:
Organize your kitchen, bath, or other essentials in a modern style with the 3 Shelf Storage Cart from Brightroom™. This white storage cart features three open shelves, giving you ample space for books, photos, vases and other essentials. It's made with a metal frame and has rolling wheels and side handles for easy movement around spaces.

Brightroom™: See your space in a new light.
